pdg_node.statement: (sampling_rate: positive float or int (Hz)) -> tuple[positive int (samples), positive int (samples)]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Convert time-based window durations (100ms and 300ms) into integer sample counts based on the sampling rate.

pdg_node.statement: (signal: 1-D numeric array, TH: float) -> positive float
pdg_node.informal_desc: Estimate the signal amplitude range using a 100-bin density histogram and cumulative distribution thresholding at 1% tails, then derive a normalization factor as the maximum absolute boundary value.

declaration.name: compute_signal_normalization_range
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, TH: float) -> positive float
declaration.docstring: Estimate the signal amplitude range using a 100-bin density histogram and cumulative distribution thresholding at 1% tails, then derive a normalization factor as the maximum absolute boundary value.

declaration.name: compute_signal_normalization_range
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, TH: float) -> positive float
declaration.docstring: Estimate the signal amplitude range using a 100-bin density histogram and cumulative distribution thresholding at 1% tails, then derive a normalization factor as the maximum absolute boundary value.

declaration.name: compute_signal_normalization_range
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, TH: float) -> positive float
declaration.docstring: Estimate the signal amplitude range using a 100-bin density histogram and cumulative distribution thresholding at 1% tails, then derive a normalization factor as the maximum absolute boundary value.

pdg_node.statement: (signal: 1-D numeric array, nrm: positive float) -> 1-D float array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Divide the raw signal by the normalization factor to produce a unit-scaled signal whose amplitude is bounded near [-1, 1].

declaration.name: normalize_signal
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, nrm: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Divide the raw signal by the normalization factor to produce a unit-scaled signal whose amplitude is bounded near [-1, 1].

pdg_node.statement: (norm_signal: 1-D float array, tol: float) -> 1-D int array of sample indices
pdg_node.informal_desc: Compute the second discrete difference of the normalized signal, then locate candidate peak indices where the negated second difference has a local maximum (sign-change of -2 in its first difference) and exceeds the tolerance threshold.

declaration.name: detect_curvature_extrema
declaration.type_signature: (norm_signal: 1-D float array, tol: float) -> 1-D int array of sample indices
declaration.docstring: Compute the second discrete difference of the normalized signal, then locate candidate peak indices where the negated second difference has a local maximum (sign-change of -2 in its first difference) and exceeds the tolerance threshold.

declaration.name: detect_curvature_extrema
declaration.type_signature: (norm_signal: 1-D float array, tol: float) -> 1-D int array of sample indices
declaration.docstring: Compute the second discrete difference of the normalized signal, then locate candidate peak indices where the negated second difference has a local maximum (sign-change of -2 in its first difference) and exceeds the tolerance threshold.

declaration.name: detect_curvature_extrema
declaration.type_signature: (norm_signal: 1-D float array, tol: float) -> 1-D int array of sample indices
declaration.docstring: Compute the second discrete difference of the normalized signal, then locate candidate peak indices where the negated second difference has a local maximum (sign-change of -2 in its first difference) and exceeds the tolerance threshold.

pdg_node.statement: (candidates: 1-D int array of sample indices, signal: 1-D numeric array, v_100ms: positive int (samples), v_300ms: positive int (samples)) -> list of float/int sample indices
pdg_node.informal_desc: Walk through the candidate indices in order, enforcing a minimum inter-peak spacing of v_300ms; for each accepted candidate, locate the true R-peak as the argmax of the original signal within the following v_100ms samples.

declaration.name: refine_rpeaks_with_refractory_window
declaration.type_signature: (candidates: 1-D int array of sample indices, signal: 1-D numeric array, v_100ms: positive int (samples), v_300ms: positive int (samples)) -> list of float/int sample indices
declaration.docstring: Walk through the candidate indices in order, enforcing a minimum inter-peak spacing of v_300ms; for each accepted candidate, locate the true R-peak as the argmax of the original signal within the following v_100ms samples.

pdg_node.statement: (rpeaks_raw: list of float/int sample indices) -> 1-D int array of sample indices
pdg_node.informal_desc: Remove duplicate R-peak indices, sort them in ascending order, and cast to a 1-D integer NumPy array ready for return.

declaration.docstring: Remove duplicate R-peak indices, sort them in ascending order, and cast to a 1-D integer NumPy array ready for return.
